scripts.test:e2e:mock:all: npm run test:e2e:mock:smoke && npm run test:e2e:mock:full
scripts.test:e2e:real:all: npm run test:e2e:real:smoke && npm run test:e2e:real:full
scripts.build: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && vite build
scripts.build:default: VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=default tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=default tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=default vite build
scripts.build:b1: VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=b1 tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=b1 tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=b1 vite build
scripts.build:b2: VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=b2 tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=b2 tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=b2 vite build
scripts.build:c1: VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=c1 tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=c1 tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=c1 vite build
scripts.build:c2: VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=c2 tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=c2 tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_UI_SCHEME=c2 vite build
